name: Warden
description: AI code review agent from Sentry — define review skills in Markdown, run locally before pushing or auto-trigger on every PR via GitHub Action. Built-in security-review and code-review skills included.

skills.name: PR Security Review
skills.description: Scan pull request diffs for exploitable vulnerabilities — SQL injection, hardcoded secrets, auth flaws — with suggested code fixes.

skills.name: Custom Skill Authoring
skills.description: Define any review concern as a Markdown skill file; Warden runs all skills in parallel on each changed file chunk.

skills.name: Local Pre-Push Check
skills.description: Run all configured skills against your local diff before pushing — catches issues before CI triggers on the PR.
